case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. KEVIN ALEXANDER RODRIGUEZ ROSALES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSALES, KEVIN ALEXANDER RODRIGUEZ $1,994.94 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,094.94 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SOLANO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, INC AS TO DEFENDANT ROSALES, KEVIN ALEXANDER RODRIGUEZ
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,994.94 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROSALES, KEVIN ALEXANDER RODRIGUEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEVIN ALEXANDER RODRIQUEZ ROSALES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
